sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48047" key="qei=on2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεῖον</orth> (B), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n48047.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the Divinity</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θεῖος</ref> </xr> (A) <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
